privileged_info_summary: Task operates on synthetic data with a test patient (Margaret Thompson, DOB 1958-07-22) and synthetic medication record. The target drug METFORMIN 500 mg is a real medication with documented gastrointestinal side effects including nausea, diarrhea, vomiting, and abdominal discomfort. All required discontinuation keywords (gi, nausea, diarrhea, vomit, stomach, abdominal, side effect, intolerance) are verified as legitimate metformin adverse effects. Credentials (oscardoc/oscar/1117) are the default test credentials for the OSCAR EMR Docker environment. The task uses the open-source OSCAR EMR system deployed via Docker with MariaDB backend.
